So right now we say we have 99% coverage in terms of concessions.
So we use a large language model.
We go out there, we collect the concessions, we'll parse them out and apply the concession to the appropriate floor plan or unit.
And then we'll calculate that effective rent and that effective price per foot for you at the property level, at the floor plan level and all the way down to the unit level.
Uh But Alex to your, to your question, we amortize it over a 12 month period.
So that's the way that our kind of concession reporting process goes and for what it's worth again, talking about our competition.

Anytime we go head to head in terms of AAA data audit, um our concession reporting is about 66% more accurate again because of our space in the industry and, and the team that we have behind our product.

We always use a property website as the primary source of truth for the data.

However, we found that the property website, the data there is significantly better uh for a multitude of reasons.
But um I, I think that's actually a competitive advantage for us as well.
